overview: Pressure points are tied to Shani and need measured handling. Mixed stretches are shaped by Guru and Rahu and Ketu and need timing awareness.
yearlyTheme: For Dhanu Rashi individuals, the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram (from March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027) will yield mixed results due to the influence of Jupiter throughout the year.
opportunities: Until December 4, 2026, Rahu will provide favorable outcomes, during which individuals will display great worldly intelligence and gain benefits through their siblings. Financial gains are predicted through well-settled children, and there will be overall progress in the family lineage.
caution: Family circumstances may frequently lead to difficulties, and the health issues of maternal relatives could cause significant concern. Notably, there is a high risk of facing legal complications this year; therefore, it is crucial to stay away from any unlawful activities.
studiesCareer: While financial income remains satisfactory, those who have invested in partnership businesses may face losses. Students must put in extra effort to achieve their goals.
familyRelationships: During this period, you will be supportive and beneficial to your children, and any eye-related health issues are likely to subside. You may have to hear distressing news regarding relatives, and even when you act in the best interest of your kin, you may face their opposition or enmity.
healthWellbeing: Family circumstances may frequently lead to difficulties, and the health issues of maternal relatives could cause significant concern. During this period, you will be supportive and beneficial to your children, and any eye-related health issues are likely to subside.
blessing: In summary, during the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram, only Jupiter (Guru) will bestow some favorable results for those born under Dhanu Rashi. Conversely, the influences of Saturn (Shani), Rahu, and Ketu are not particularly favorable, suggesting a year where cautious navigation and spiritual remedies are essential to overcome challenges.

planetaryInfluences.summary: For Dhanu Rashi individuals, the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram (from March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027) will yield mixed results due to the influence of Jupiter throughout the year.

During the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram, individuals belonging to Dhanu Rashi will experience adverse results due to the influence of Saturn (Shani) throughout the year. Family circumstances may frequently lead to difficulties, and the health issues of maternal relatives could cause significant concern. There are indications that a portion of ancestral or inherited property may be spent or diminished during this period. Despite acting with the utmost responsibility, you may find it difficult to gain the satisfaction or appreciation of your family members, often leading you to seek solitude and a life of isolation. Notably, there is a high risk of facing legal complications this year; therefore, it is crucial to stay away from any unlawful activities. It is important to clarify that Dhanu Rashi natives are not under the influence of Sade Sati (Elinati Shani) during this year.

In the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram, Dhanu Rashi natives will experience mixed results due to the influence of Rahu. Until December 4, 2026, Rahu will provide favorable outcomes, during which individuals will display great worldly intelligence and gain benefits through their siblings. Financial gains are predicted through well-settled children, and there will be overall progress in the family lineage. However, from December 5, 2026, until the end of the year, Rahu will bring adverse effects; although the income remains good, wealth will not stay in hand. An excessive desire for power or authority may lead to new problems, and physical health may not be very cooperative during this period.

For individuals belonging to Dhanu Rashi, the influence of Ketu in the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram will result in mixed outcomes throughout the year. Until December 4, 2026, you will enjoy a peaceful and worry-free life, gradually becoming more inclined toward spirituality and divine power. During this period, you will be supportive and beneficial to your children, and any eye-related health issues are likely to subside. However, from December 5, 2026, until the end of the year, Ketu will bring adverse results. You may have to hear distressing news regarding relatives, and even when you act in the best interest of your kin, you may face their opposition or enmity. There might be a lack of mental clarity and sharpness, and one should be cautious as there are indications of causing harm or trouble to women.

monthlyHighlights.summary: This month will yield mixed results. While financial income remains satisfactory, those who have invested in partnership businesses may face losses. During the second week, you may receive distressing news regarding a family member, and the domestic atmosphere might remain restless or tense. Expenses are likely to increase in the middle of the month. Individuals born under the Poorvashada Nakshatra may face unfavorable outcomes regarding marriage or children-related matters. In the final week, you will be blessed with divine visits (Darshan), and your desire for solo travel will be fulfilled. Students must put in extra effort to achieve their goals. Cautionary Dates: In this month, the 2nd, 6th, 7th, 15th, and 29th are not favorable.

During this month, marriage efforts for the unmarried will yield fruitful results, and your desire to own a vehicle will be fulfilled. You are likely to purchase gold or new decorative items for your home. You will gain the wisdom and eloquence to speak continuously on various subjects. However, new enemies may arise during this period. Students will be able to grasp subjects quickly and perform well. For the elderly, health issues will gradually decrease, and business activities will proceed as expected. For employees, the career outlook will be somewhat anxious this month. Deceptive behavior could lead to a loss of reputation, and you may find it difficult to gain cooperation from your colleagues. In your conversations, excessive or inappropriate humor may cause losses or misunderstandings. Turning toward a spiritual path will be necessary for mental peace. You must be particularly careful regarding your career after the 23rd of this month. Furthermore, this is not an auspicious time to launch new business ventures.

New endeavors will prove to be profitable this month. This is an auspicious time to restart projects that were previously abandoned due to financial difficulties. You will be able to complete your planned tasks efficiently. This month will be highly beneficial for those in the agricultural sector, and professionals as well as business people will see success. Those in the teaching profession can look forward to potential promotions. However, efforts related to children (conception/progeny) may face hurdles; specifically, individuals born under the Moola Nakshatra may require planetary remedies (Graha Shanti) regarding children. There are indications of the loss of a close family member. For those seeking government jobs or those trying for a job transfer, this month is very favorable. You will enter into new agreements or contracts. By adapting to the prevailing circumstances, you will be able to seize good opportunities. Cautionary Dates: In this month, the 4th, 5th, and 6th are not favorable.

In this month, your planned efforts will not progress easily, and tasks may face frequent delays. It is best to postpone any new beginnings during this period. You may encounter deeply dissatisfying events within the family and face conflicts regarding ancestral properties. After the 16th, there is a risk of eye-related health issues or injuries resulting from vehicle accidents; caution is advised. However, after the 20th, family relationships will strengthen, and you will be able to gain expertise in a new field. You will come to realize the true importance of your life partner during this time. Women will exhibit a righteous and virtuous nature. You will establish friendly relations with influential people. Financial income will remain average this month. You will develop a preference for a 'Sattvic' (pure and simple) diet and may spend excessively on those you care about. Due to the influence of Saturn, the youth might be drawn toward bad habits or addictions; practicing self-control is essential.

You will experience moderate results this month. Individuals born under the Poorvashada and Uttarashada Nakshatras may face unrest and potential setbacks in their professional environment. Financial income will slightly decrease during this period. You may encounter losses due to a person you trusted blindly. It is advised to be cautious regarding matters involving your spouse's family members. If you are planning to start new tasks, seek a job transfer, or pursue employment opportunities abroad, the period between the 17th and 23rd is most favorable. Political support will be instrumental in helping you stabilize your career. Your long-standing plans to generate income from immovable properties will not materialize this month. Although expenses will rise toward the end of the month, funds will somehow be managed or adjusted.

This month, elderly individuals may face increased health issues related to blood or circulation. Marital bliss might be lacking during this period. There are indications of health and financial difficulties arising from illicit relationships; caution is highly advised. Financial income will remain average. Individuals born under the Uttarashada Nakshatra will be able to make decorative changes or renovations to their homes. Women will experience an increase in mental strength and will be able to express their likes and dislikes fearlessly. For the youth, opportunities will arise to regain lost reputation and prestige. You will be able to complete tasks effectively using your communication skills and diplomacy. Legal matters and court cases are likely to conclude in your favor. For the business community, the last two weeks of the month will be highly profitable, and unexpected luck may lead to securing major business deals. Cautionary Dates: Be extra careful with financial transactions on the 8th, 12th, 15th, 20th, and 28th of this month.

During this month, you will see a decline in the influence or strength of your enemies. You will develop deep devotion and respect toward your teachers and elders (Guru-vargam). You will be involved in making travel arrangements for the elderly members of your family. However, you may need to spend a significant amount of time and money on your subordinates or domestic help. Business activities will proceed smoothly and favorably throughout the month. Financial expenditure will be somewhat high during this period. Young women born under the Moola Nakshatra might face the anger or displeasure of family elders. Doubts and uncertainties may arise in every matter, and marriage negotiations might face setbacks or fall through. In your professional life, you might create situations that lead to an abrupt resignation from your job. Regarding family disputes, you may find yourself running around for political recommendations or mediation. Personal health also requires careful attention this month. You will come to realize the profound importance of good company (Sajjana Sangatyam) and divine devotion in daily life.

This month, you may be haunted by a persistent sense of mental unrest. Situations will arise that make it difficult for you to mingle or socialize with others. You might experience anxiety or fear during travels. Your habit of operating in secrecy or handling matters confidentially could lead to unexpected problems, especially as those who are privy to your secrets might put you in difficult spots. Uncertainty in your professional life will continue through this month as well. Assistance from the people you rely on will be delayed. In financial matters, the miserly attitude and stubbornness of family members may cause you deep disappointment. Regarding marriage proposals, you may encounter matches that are of a lower social or professional status than yours. Health-wise, you may suffer from 'Vata' (gastric or joint-related) ailments. Remedies: During this month, it is highly recommended to perform Tilabhishekam to Lord Shani and donate black sesame seeds to Brahmins to mitigate negative effects.

This month will bring some favorable changes in your circumstances. Financial difficulties will begin to subside. It is advisable to be cautious and deliberate in every action you take. You will develop a habit of speaking to others with increased respect. Job-related efforts will become fruitful after the 6th of this month; ensure you make the most of every opportunity that comes your way. However, this is not a suitable time to expect massive results or to overthink matters. The same principle applies to marriage negotiations—maintain realistic expectations. Physical health issues will start to decrease. During the third week, you might misplace or forget important items, leading to unnecessary travel or wasted trips. From the final week onwards, business affairs will proceed favorably, and you will achieve the profits you expected. Additionally, the hearing for long-pending legal or court matters is likely to commence during this period.

Financial income will be strong this month. Your efforts to establish new sources of revenue will be successful, and you will use your intelligence to enhance your earnings. You will enjoy a comfortable and pleasant lifestyle. A specific responsibility related to your sisters or their families may fall upon you. Marriage proposals initiated this month are likely to reach a successful conclusion. In marital life, long-standing disputes or misunderstandings will finally be resolved. From the beginning of the third week, a joyful and cheerful atmosphere will prevail. Women are advised to practice being more straightforward and assertive in their communication. For individuals born under the Uttarashada Nakshatra, this month is highly auspicious for establishing small-scale industries or new ventures. Regarding newborns this month, they may face future challenges such as speech delays or excessive emotional excitability over minor issues; performing appropriate Graha Shanti (planetary remedies) is recommended.

This month brings success in home-related matters, such as acquiring a new property or making significant progress in house construction. You will find relief from the troubles caused by enemies, and financial difficulties will subside. You will be able to complete all your undertaken tasks on time. Unemployed individuals can expect long-awaited good news regarding job opportunities. Your health will be supportive throughout this period. For business people, the atmosphere of uncertainty will clear away, leading to an increase in financial income. Professionals across all fields will receive rewards commensurate with their hard work. Students will succeed in securing admissions for higher education abroad as desired. In this month, the 15th, 16th, and 17th are highly favorable; you may take important life decisions during these dates. Additionally, the children of those born under the Poorvashada Nakshatra will settle into excellent and stable positions in life.

In this month, you will receive financial income as expected. You will develop great skill and strategic wisdom in earning and managing wealth. Auspicious events or celebrations (Shubhakaryam) will be conducted at home. You will receive the blessings of your family elders for the tasks you undertake. However, your physical rest will decrease during this period as you remain busy. You might find yourself dissatisfied with the way others perform their tasks. Those who rely on traditional or ancestral occupations (Kula Vritti) will acquire modern tools or equipment to enhance their work. Except for politicians, this month will be highly favorable for individuals in all other fields. Long-distance travels undertaken during this month will also prove to be successful and fruitful.

This month will continue to be pleasant, filled with family happiness and joy. You will spend quality time with the people you love, and all your mental burdens will vanish. You will notice a positive transformation in the personalities of your family members, and any previous lack of coordination or misunderstandings between you and your family will be resolved. Your intelligence and talents will be recognized by others. Matters related to your life partner will bring deep satisfaction. Furthermore, you will achieve the expected growth and progress in your profession, business, and job.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
